title: OpenAI, Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL announce strategic content partnership
summary: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.
content: OpenAI partners with Grupo Folha and Grupo UOL to bring trusted Brazilian journalism to ChatGPT, expanding access to news with attribution and transparency.

light_analysis.summary: OpenAI宣布与巴西两大媒体集团Grupo Folha和Grupo UOL建立战略内容合作伙伴关系，将高质量的巴西新闻报道引入ChatGPT。该合作旨在通过提供带归属和透明度的新闻内容，扩大ChatGPT的信息覆盖范围，同时支持新闻机构的数字化发展。此举有助于提升巴西用户获取可靠新闻的便捷性，并强化AI产品的内容可信度。
